## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss content updates, performance metrics, and upcoming priorities for Ramp's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production progressing well: \~100 published articles, 40 per diem pages, 21 city pages, 50 updated expense category pages](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New Looker Studio dashboard created for tracking content performance, showing positive growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Focus shifting to vendor pages (100+ planned) and accounting terms optimization](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Glossary updates postponed due to subdomain issues and prioritization of vendor network content](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [Nearly 100 published articles](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [40 per diem pages created](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [21 city pages published (linked to state pages)](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [50 expense category pages updated](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Tool overview outline prepared](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [New Looker Studio dashboard created for tracking content performance](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Dashboard shows positive trends for blog and per diem pages](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Ability to filter by time period for detailed analysis](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Ramp team monitoring results, seeing week-over-week improvement in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Potential seasonality impact on traffic noted](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Upcoming CMS Switch

  - [Expected to improve core web vitals significantly](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Team to monitor for any traffic fluctuations post-switch](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Previous experience with Home Base project noted potential traffic drop after CMS change](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### New Content Opportunities

  - [Improved workflow can now scan competitor pages for ranking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Large set of accounting terms identified as potential focus area](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Vendor pages prioritized (100+ planned in first batch)](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Glossary updates postponed due to subdomain issues and focus on vendor network](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Some older credit card content unpublished due to lack of search volume and potential cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Team running regular cannibalization reports to optimize content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Crawl budget analysis suggested for future optimization](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share Looker Studio dashboard access with team members](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

  - [Team to provide updates during holiday period for any pressing matters](https://fathom.video/share/kmPns_Z5CXzsXs2TMGLJd9_pFkJhKVMz?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
